title: The God of High School
sourceNotes: Single 13-episode cours by MAPPA (2020). Paired with Yongje Park's original Korean webtoon (AniList type MANGA, FINISHED at 569 webtoon episodes counted as chapters). The anime adapts only the early portion of the webtoon (roughly episodes 1-112, ending the National Tournament), then compresses, reorders, and diverges with an original divine-awakening finale. Per-arc chapter boundaries are approximate. A large unadapted tail (Sage Realm onward) runs from ch 113 to the 569 ending.

mappings.arc: The God of High School — Seoul Preliminary & Main Tournament
Nox / Ragnarok conflict & Sun Wukong reveal (anime-original finale; diverges and compresses)
Sage Realm → Ragnarok World Tournament → RE: Fight with God (unadapted)
